summary: Enumerates the Shell_TrayWnd host executable and system tray (notification area) icon tooltips, with optional full image paths for the taskbar host and each tray icon owner process.
redTeamContext: Tray icons reveal running security agents, VPN clients, collaboration tools, and other software without process listing. Resolving host and per-icon image paths helps operators map EDR stacks and user workflows from the interactive desktop session.
